memoryArtifacts.headline: Biographical Wikipedia Article
memoryArtifacts.description:
John Leventhorpe (c. 1370 – 1435), of Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire and Ugley, Essex, was an English politician and one of the executors of both Henry IV's and Henry V's wills.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex"於1370年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯時，他的父親Robert Leventhorpe25歲，母親Isabel Totty21歲。他和Katherine De Riley至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1433年5月27日在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex" was born in 1370, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Leventhorpe, was 25 and his mother, Isabel Totty, was 21. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Katherine De Riley. He died on 27 May 1433, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex" est né en 1370, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Leventhorpe, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabel Totty, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Katherine De Riley. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1433, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.Yorkshire West Riding, England: Yorkshire West Riding, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex" 1370 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Leventhorpe 25 und seine Mutter Isabel Totty 21. Er hatte mit Katherine De Riley mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Mai 1433 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Katherine De Riley. Morì il 27 maggio 1433, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex"が1370年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで生まれた時，父Robert Leventhorpeは25歳，母Isabel Tottyは21歳であった。彼はKatherine De Rileyとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1433年5月27日に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex"(이)가 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Leventhorpe(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Totty(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Katherine De Riley(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1433년 5월 27일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex" родился в 1370 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Leventhorpe было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Totty, 21. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Katherine De Riley. Он умер 27 мая 1433 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия.
